name: crystal-oracle
description: Crystal Oracle provides traditional Chinese metaphysics divination for AI agents: BaZi chart casting, reading interpretation, Qi Men Dun Jia divination, and Ziwei Doushu (Purple Star) astrology. Paid tools use x402 micropayments on Base chain (USDC).

auth.description: Paid tools require x402 HTTP 402 micropayment protocol. Free tools (crystal_oracle_chart_free) require no payment.

tools.name: crystal_oracle_chart_free
tools.description: Free simplified BaZi chart casting. Returns chart_id, natal origin, and body palace without full six-palace details.

birth_epoch.description: Birth datetime in ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z

tools.name: crystal_oracle_chart
tools.description: Full six-palace natal chart casting. Returns complete chart with all palace details, star placements, and deity analysis.

birth_epoch.description: Birth datetime in ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z

tools.name: crystal_oracle_reading
tools.description: Chart reading and interpretation with fortune assessment, auspicious/inauspicious analysis, and actionable advice. Requires chart_id from a previous chart casting.

chart_id.description: Chart ID returned from crystal_oracle_chart or crystal_oracle_chart_free

tools.name: crystal_oracle_divination
tools.description: Qi Men Dun Jia style divination with nine-sector layout. Strategic oracle for specific questions and decisions. Requires chart_id from a previous chart casting.

chart_id.description: Chart ID from a previous chart casting

query.description: The question or matter to divine upon

tools.name: ziwei_chart
tools.description: Ziwei Doushu (Purple Star Astrology) chart casting: 14 main stars + auxiliary stars + Sihua (Four Transformations) + Daxian (Major Decade). Returns complete twelve-palace chart using precise lunar calendar.

tools.name: ziwei_reading
tools.description: Ziwei Doushu reading: palace-by-palace analysis + Sihua interpretation + Daxian fortune period. Requires chart_id from ziwei_chart.

age.description: Current age (for Daxian fortune period analysis)
